creator: naddy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 250703
irc/ircII: update to 20240111

This is a straightforward maintenance update of irc/ircII to the latest release 20240111.

Our patches have been integrated upstream.

Since the purpose of GNU_CONFIGURE_MANPREFIX was to ease the move to share/man, I switched back to fixing up mandir in Makefile.in.

See the attached patch.  OK to commit?
